findings.title: Inline-spec runs can inherit stale issue context
findings.detail: MODE = inline_spec skips Step 2, but nothing clears or suppresses /tmp/specflow-issue.json. global/specflow.spec_review.md always reads that file when it exists, so an inline-spec run after a previous issue-based run can send an unrelated issue body into spec review. That violates FR-008/SC-003. Clear the temp file when switching to inline mode, or pass an explicit no-issue-context signal so spec review ignores any stale JSON.

findings.title: New branching and retry paths have no coverage
findings.detail: This change adds non-trivial control flow for no-arg prompting, URL-vs-inline classification, empty-input retry, and fetch-failure recovery, but the diff includes no automated checks and no recorded manual validation for the spec's acceptance scenarios and edge cases.

findings.title: Top-level command synopsis still documents only issue-URL input
findings.detail: The feature now supports /specflow with no arguments and /specflow <text> as inline spec input, but CLAUDE.md still advertises /specflow <issue-url> only. Update the slash-command summary so the documented interface matches the new behavior.
